title: Fix Google OAuth configuration error

requirements.text: Configure VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID environment variable in the frontend build configuration to enable Google OAuth authentication

quotes: Google Client ID not configured. Please set VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID environment variable.

acceptanceCriteria: VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID environment variable is set in the frontend configuration
The error message 'Google Client ID not configured' no longer appears
The 'Connect Google Account' button initiates OAuth flow successfully

requirements.text: Verify Google OAuth credentials are correctly configured in the backend for the OAuth callback flow
acceptanceCriteria: Backend can successfully process OAuth callback requests
User credentials are stored successfully after OAuth authorization

requirements.text: Test the complete Google account connection flow from button click through OAuth callback to successful connection status display
acceptanceCriteria: User can click 'Connect Google Account' button
ChannelConnection component displays connected status with channel information
User can successfully post clips to YouTube after connection

constraints: Do not modify the existing OAuth flow logic in OAuthCallback.tsx or ChannelConnection.tsx
Preserve the existing backend OAuth credential storage mechanism
Maintain compatibility with Internet Identity authentication
nonGoals: Changing the OAuth provider from Google
Modifying the UI design of the connection components
